creator: dan.kotowski@a9development.com
text:
devel/esbuild bumped to 0.24.0 on 2024-12-14, causing a mismatch during build.

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=adf6019c3c9053e617353dfb9f0843e4880ab4ae



> signal-desktop@7.35.0 build:esbuild
> node scripts/esbuild.js

✘ [ERROR] Cannot start service: Host version "0.21.2" does not match binary version "0.24.0"

root@pkg1:/usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop # jq '.devDependencies.esbuild' /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop/work/Signal-Desktop-7.35.0/package.json
"0.21.2"

root@pkg1:/usr/ports/net-im/signal-desktop # pkg query %n-%v | grep esbuild
esbuild-0.24.0
